name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.2 mm Stainless Steel
notes: Ultra-fine detail only. DO NOT use with CF/GF/abrasive filaments — stainless wears rapidly. PLA/PETG/ABS standard grades only.

name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.4 mm Hardened Steel
notes: General-purpose workhorse. Safe for CF/GF abrasives. Default for all AMS multi-color jobs.

name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.6 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Large functional parts, engineering filaments. Hardened steel handles CF/GF.

name: Bambu Hotend H2-P2S — 0.8 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Maximum throughput; coarse detail. Hardened steel safe for abrasives.

name: Bambu High Flow Hotend H2-P2S — 0.4 mm Hardened Steel
notes: ~62% higher max volumetric speed vs standard flow at 0.4 mm. Use Bambu Studio High Flow nozzle profile. Safe for CF/GF.

name: Bambu High Flow Hotend H2-P2S — 0.6 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Primary choice for PA6-CF, PETG-CF, ABS-GF, PPA-CF fast printing. Use High Flow slicer profile.

name: Bambu High Flow Hotend H2-P2S — 0.8 mm Hardened Steel
notes: Maximum throughput nozzle. Best for large jigs, fixtures, drafts. Use 0.8 mm High Flow slicer profile.

name: Bambu Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.4 mm
notes: For high-wear abrasive filaments (CF/GF/metal-fill). Tungsten carbide outlasts hardened steel significantly. Nozzle-only replacement — press-fit into existing hotend heating assembly.

name: Bambu Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.6 mm
notes: Best for bulk CF/GF printing at 0.6 mm. Use with High Flow heating assembly for max throughput on abrasives.

name: Bambu Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.8 mm
notes: Maximum throughput abrasive printing. Verify before ordering that you need nozzle-only vs full hotend assembly.

name: Bambu High Flow Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.4 mm
notes: High flow + tungsten carbide = highest durability for abrasive materials at 0.4 mm. Premium option.

name: Bambu High Flow Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.6 mm
notes: High flow + tungsten carbide at 0.6 mm. Best combination for bulk CF/GF production printing.

name: Bambu High Flow Tungsten Carbide Nozzle H2-P2S — 0.8 mm
notes: Maximum throughput + maximum wear resistance. Niche: very high-volume abrasive printing.

name: Bambu Textured PEI Plate — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 Series)
notes: Default plate shipped with P2S. Flex steel magnetic spring plate with sprayed dual-sided textured PEI. Works with PLA, PETG, ABS, ASA, PA, PC. Older plates without QR code: select 'Ignore' for plate detection or disable feature.

name: Bambu Smooth PEI Plate — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 Series)
notes: Smooth surface finish on bottom of prints. Good for PLA, PETG, ABS, PA. Occasional stock shortages — check availability.

name: Bambu Cool Plate SuperTack Pro — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 / A1)
notes: PLA/PETG without glue stick. Parts auto-release on cooling. Do not use above recommended bed temps — can damage coating. P2S explicitly listed as compatible.

name: Bambu Engineering Plate — 256 mm (P2S / X1 / P1 / A1)
notes: For ABS, PC, PA, ASA requiring high-temp bed. Use with glue stick for best adhesion. P2S explicitly compatible.

name: Bambu Hotend Silicone Sock — P2S (3-pack)
notes: P2S-specific — NOT compatible with H2D, A1, or P1S. Maintains stable nozzle temperature, protects from ooze. Replace when torn or deformed. ~3-pack per unit.

name: Nozzle Wiping Pad — P2S
notes: P2S-specific consumable. Soft silicone pad on the purge wiper; cleans nozzle residue before each print. Replace when worn/compressed. Consumable — keep 2–3 in stock.

name: Purge Wiper Assembly — P2S
notes: P2S-specific — DO NOT install on X1 or P1. Full wiper assembly (not just the pad). Replace if damaged or if wiper calibration repeatedly fails.

name: Filament Cutter Replacement — P2S
notes: Cutter blade (compatible with P2S per FAQ). Replace every 8–12 spools for PLA/PETG/ABS/PC; every 4–10 spools for CF/GF abrasives. Note: cutter LEVER is NOT P1S-compatible; blade only is compatible.

name: Activated Carbon Air Filter — P2S
notes: P2S-specific filter; larger surface area than P1. Replace when saturated (visible discoloration or VOC smell). Rinse cover if needed, dry fully before reinstall.

name: Hotend Cooling Fan — P2S
notes: Cools upper hotend to prevent heat creep. Replace if noisy, seized, or if HMS reports thermal runaway / extruder overload alongside heat-creep symptoms.

name: Auxiliary Part Cooling Fan — Left (P2S)
notes: Extra part cooling for left-side slot; improves cooling balance. Also the spare unit if the installed aux fan fails. Installation guide: wiki .../install-auxiliary-part-cooling-fan-left.

name: Extruder Gear Assembly — P2S
notes: NOT compatible with P1S — P2S uses different PMSM servo extruder with hardened steel gears. Replace if grinding, slipping, or under-extrusion persists after cleaning. Periodic cleaning + re-grease recommended before replacement.

name: XY Belt — P2S
notes: NOT compatible with P1S (different sizes). Replace when belt tension HMS warning appears and re-tensioning does not resolve it, or on visible cracking. Two belts per printer (X + Y).

name: Eddy Current Sensor — P2S
notes: Active flow calibration + auto bed leveling sensor. Replace if bed leveling fails consistently after re-calibration. Adjustment guide: wiki .../adjust-the-eddy-sensor.

name: Desiccant for AMS 2 Pro and AMS HT — 6-pack
notes: Color-changing silicone desiccant — yellow when fresh, turns purple when saturated. Recharge by drying at 80 °C for 1–2 h or via AMS 2 Pro drying cycle. Keep 1–2 spare packs in stock.

name: AMS 2 Pro Feeder Unit
notes: Core filament transport module per slot. Ceramic-reinforced bushings. 4 per AMS 2 Pro unit. Replace if feeder grinds filament, fails to retract, or motor shows overload error. Verify stock before ordering — frequently sells out.

name: PTFE Tube — AMS 2 Pro Internal
notes: AMS 2 Pro internal routing tube. Replace if cracked, discoloured by abrasive filaments, or if filament tangles consistently in the AMS path.

name: Bambu PTFE Tube — 4000 mm (cut to size)
notes: 4 m roll of raw PTFE tubing (2.5 mm ID / 4 mm OD) — cut to any length for P2S routing. Standard P2S cuts: 600 mm (AMS 2 Pro to buffer), 555 mm, 350 mm, 280 mm. Officially listed as P2S-compatible in the EU store device filter. Cross-compatible: X1/P1/P2S/H2D/H2S, A1 series.

name: Bambu Lubricant Oil — 6-pack
notes: For X/Y hollow steel rods and Z guide rails ONLY. Never apply grease to shafts. 1–2 drops per 5 cm, spread by moving toolhead/bed 3–5×. Included in P2S toolbox; restock when depleted.

name: Bambu Lubricant Grease
notes: For Z-axis lead screws and extruder gear assembly. Never use on rods/rails — oil only for those. Included in P2S toolbox; restock when depleted.

name: Hotend Heating Assembly — P2S
notes: NOT compatible with H2D or A1. Contains heater block, thermistor, heater cartridge. Replace after hotend blob damage or thermistor/heater cartridge failure. Full procedure: wiki .../replace-heating-assembly.

name: Bambu Lab AMS 2 Pro — Automatic Material System (standalone)
notes: 4-slot automatic material system for P2S. Active 65 °C drying, RFID sync, airtight storage, brushless servo feeders. First unit powered via 6-pin bus cable from P2S; additional units need the Switching Adapter. Box includes Bambu Bus 6-pin cable, PTFE tubes (185×2 + 225×2 + 900 mm), and desiccant. All Bambu Lab printers compatible.

name: Bambu Lab AMS HT — Automatic Material System High Temp (standalone)
notes: 4-slot high-temperature AMS for PA-CF, PET-CF, PC, PAHT-CF: dries up to 85 °C vs AMS 2 Pro's 65 °C. Has a bypass outlet for soft/brittle materials (TPU manual feed). Self-powered AC cord — drying does not draw from the printer. Includes 6-pin bus cable, PTFE tubes (263×2 + 900 mm), desiccant. P2S supports up to 4× AMS 2 Pro + 4× AMS HT (20 slots).

name: AMS 2 Pro Switching Adapter
notes: Required for each ADDITIONAL AMS 2 Pro unit when drying is needed on P2S. First AMS 2 Pro dries directly off the printer's 6-pin cable; any subsequent unit needs its own Switching Adapter (combines power + signal switching — replaces the standalone 24 V/4 A brick). Cross-compatible: X1/P1/P2S/H2D/H2S/X2D.

name: Bambu 4-in-1 PTFE Adapter
notes: Splits one printer PTFE inlet into 4 channels: lets you run AMS + up to 3 external spools simultaneously (e.g. TPU/PET-CF via direct spool while AMS handles standard filaments). Install at buffer output port. Select 'X1 Series/P1 Series/H2D/H2S/P2S' variant — NOT the H2C 'Adapter II' variant. Cross-compatible: X1/P1/H2D/H2S/P2S.

name: TPU Feed Assist Module
notes: Active near-extruder pusher for TPU 90A/85A printing. Eliminates AMS incompatibility for soft filaments. Housing must be self-printed (free STL on MakerWorld model 2539247). Install on right hotend for best results. Requires AMS HT or separate dryer with spool rotation as external feeder. Cross-compatible: H2/X1/P1/P2S/X2D. ETA May 2026.

name: Filament Buffer — P2S
notes: P2S/P2-series filament buffer. Pre-installed on P2S Combo; standalone P2S owners need this to use AMS 2 Pro or the External Exhaust Fan Kit. Y-shaped channel, two AMS input ports, Hall sensor for tangle detection. NOT the same as X1/P1 buffer.

name: Spool Holder — P2S
notes: Plastic bracket for a single external filament spool, mounted on P2S rear. P2S-specific design — not the X1/P1 holder. Included in standalone P2S box; Combo owners (with AMS 2 Pro) may want a spare or second one for TPU.

name: External Exhaust Fan Kit — P2S
notes: Adds active external exhaust to P2S for ABS/PA/PC fume management. Auto mode-switching per filament type; manual override via screen/Studio/Handy. Enables 'Purify Air After Printing'. Requires FW ≥ 01.01.01.00, Studio ≥ 2.4.1.80, Handy ≥ 3.11.0. Two SKU variants: kit-only or kit + updated rear panel (FAS071-V2). Standalone P2S also needs Filament Buffer (SA011).

name: External Exhaust Air Filter (for Exhaust Fan Kit) — P2S
notes: Optional add-on filter cartridge for the External Exhaust Fan Kit. Adds VOC/particle filtration on the exhaust outlet — recommended if exhaust vents indoors rather than directly outside. ~€9.50 (est.).

name: Rear Panel — P2S (Updated, FAS071-V2)
notes: Updated rear metal panel for P2S. Required for optimal External Exhaust Fan Kit installation if your unit shipped with the original rear panel. Newer P2S units ship with this pre-installed — check wiki to identify your version before ordering. Also serves as a spare/replacement.

name: Floating Damper Feet — P2S / X2D (set of 4)
notes: Tuned-frequency vibration isolators for P2S (also fits X1/P1 — pick the P2S/X2D variant). Tool-free install. Reduces desk-transmitted vibration and improves print quality when two printers share a surface. Set of 4.

name: Nozzle Cleaning Sponge — 3-pack
notes: High-temp resistant sponge for cleaning carbonised residue from nozzle exterior at printing temperature. All-series compatible. 3-pack. Often out of stock — buy multiples when available. ~€2.00 (est.).

name: Bambu Reusable Spool — Low Temp (≤70 °C), white
notes: Printable ABS spool body for Bambu refill rolls (PLA, PETG). Snap-fit assembly — print on your P2S, then load the refill. Max 70 °C (sufficient for PLA/PETG drying in AMS 2 Pro). White. ~€12.50 (est.). Use the high-temp variant for ABS/PA/PC refills.

name: Bambu Reusable Spool — High Temp (≤90 °C), black
notes: ABS+PC spool body for Bambu refill rolls requiring higher drying temps: ABS, ASA, PA6-CF, PAHT-CF, PET-CF, PC, TPU. Max 90 °C safe in AMS HT. Black. ~€12.50 (est.). Required for engineering filament refills if dried in AMS HT.

name: Bambu Glue Stick
notes: Bambu OEM glue stick. Formaldehyde-free, water-soluble. For ABS/PC/PA on Engineering Plate, or as PETG release layer on Textured PEI. All-series. Cheaper as 4-pack. ~€4.00 per stick (est.).

name: Bambu Liquid Glue — 60 mL
notes: Bambu OEM liquid glue squeeze pen. More uniform application than stick; water-cleanup. PLA/ABS/PETG/PET/ASA/TPU. ~100 full-plate applications per 60 mL. All-series. ~€17.50 (est.).

name: Maker's Supply Long Nose Pliers
notes: Bambu OEM long-nose pliers — for removing filament blobs, wire work, small-part manipulation. ~€15.50 (est.).

name: Maker's Supply Mag-Alloy Scraper
notes: Magnesium-alloy scraper blade for removing prints from PEI plates. Stiffer than plastic scrapers; safe for all Bambu PEI plates. ~€20.50 (est.). Often sold out — check availability.

name: Maker's Supply Precision Cutter
notes: Precision scoring/cutting tool for trimming supports and cleaning sharp edges. From ~€6.50 (est.). Multiple variants.

name: Maker's Supply Flush Cutter
notes: Flush-cut side cutters for removing support structures cleanly. ~€14.50 (est.). ETA June 2026 from Bambu store; available now from third-party Bambu sellers.

name: Maker's Supply Professional Trimming Tool Kit
notes: Multi-piece trimming/deburring kit for post-processing printed parts. From ~€7.50 (est.). Multiple size variants.

name: Maker's Supply ESD Stainless Steel Tweezers Set
notes: ESD-safe tweezers set for handling small parts, PCBs, and filament tips. ~€6.00 (est.). ETA May 2026 from Bambu store.

name: Maker's Supply Needle File Set — 4-piece
notes: 4-piece needle file set for filing internal surfaces, holes, and tight corners on printed parts. ~€5.00 (est.). ETA May 2026 from Bambu store.

name: Maker's Supply Screwdriver Kit
notes: Bambu OEM screwdriver set. From ~€2.80 (est.). Multiple variants (Phillips, flathead, hex bits). Useful for P2S maintenance and panel removal.

name: Maker's Supply L-Type Hex Wrench
notes: L-type hex (Allen) wrenches matching the M1.5 and M2.0 keys in the P2S toolbox. From ~€2.20 (est.). Useful spares — stock keys are easily lost.

name: Maker's Supply Hand Drill Kit
notes: Pin vise / hand drill kit for clearing blocked nozzle holes, drilling printed parts, reaming PTFE connectors. From ~€7.50 (est.).

name: Durable Self-Healing Cutting Mat
notes: Self-healing cutting mat for trimming PTFE tubes, cutting filament, and post-processing parts. From ~€7.50 (est.). ETA May 2026 from Bambu store.

name: USB-C Soldering Iron Kit for Heat-Set Inserts
notes: 100 W USB-C smart soldering iron with heat-set insert tips. For installing brass threaded inserts into printed parts — standard for functional P2S accessories. ~€35 (est.) for full kit; tip-only variant cheaper.
